tasks.title: Environment Setup and Project Scaffolding
tasks.description: Initialize the project environment, directory structure, and dependency management for the Neurax framework.
tasks.details: Create the project root with subdirectories: /src (core logic), /data (data processing), /models (architecture definitions), and /tests. Setup a virtual environment and initialize a pyproject.toml or requirements.txt with essential libraries: torch, numpy, pandas, and pydantic for data validation.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify environment activation and run a 'smoke test' script that imports all major dependencies without error.

tasks.title: Data Ingestion and Preprocessing Pipeline
tasks.description: Implement a robust data loading system capable of handling various formats and performing initial transformations.
tasks.details: Develop a DataManager class that wraps torch.utils.data.DataLoader. Implement specific parsers for CSV and JSON inputs. Include normalization and standardization functions using Scikit-Learn patterns within the preprocessing pipeline.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to ensure data shapes match expectations after preprocessing and that null values are handled correctly.

tasks.title: Core Neural Network Architecture Definition
tasks.description: Design and implement the base neural network modules and layer abstractions.
tasks.details: Create a base 'NeuraxModule' class inheriting from torch.nn.Module. Implement standard layers (Linear, Conv2d) and activation functions. Ensure weight initialization follows Xavier/Kaiming standards by default.
tasks.testStrategy: Construct a simple MLP model and perform a forward pass with dummy data to verify tensor flow and output dimensions.

tasks.title: Loss Functions and Optimizer Integration
tasks.description: Configure the training optimization suite including standard loss functions and optimizers.
tasks.details: Expose common loss functions (CrossEntropy, MSE) and optimizers (Adam, SGD) via a configuration-driven factory pattern. Implement a 'TrainerConfig' pydantic model to manage hyperparameters.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate that the optimizer correctly updates model weights during a single backpropagation step.

tasks.title: Training Engine and Epoch Controller
tasks.description: Develop the main training loop with support for epochs, batching, and early stopping.
tasks.details: Implement a 'Trainer' class that iterates through the DataLoader, calculates loss, executes backprop, and tracks average loss per epoch. Include a simple early-stopping mechanism based on validation loss plateaus.
tasks.testStrategy: Run a 5-epoch training session on a synthetic dataset (e.g., XOR problem) and confirm loss reduction over time.

tasks.title: Model Serialization and Checkpointing
tasks.description: Implement logic to save and load model states, including optimizer parameters and metadata.
tasks.details: Create a CheckpointManager that uses torch.save to persist .pt or .pth files. Save the model's state_dict, optimizer state, and current epoch count to allow training resumption.
tasks.testStrategy: Save a model, modify weights in memory, reload from disk, and assert that the reloaded weights match the original saved state.

tasks.title: Inference Engine and Prediction API
tasks.description: Build a high-level API for running predictions on trained models with optimized inference settings.
tasks.details: Implement a 'Predictor' class that sets the model to eval() mode and wraps logic in torch.no_grad(). Add support for batch inference and basic output post-processing (e.g., softmax to class labels).
tasks.testStrategy: Compare the output of the Predictor against a manual forward pass to ensure consistency.

tasks.title: Evaluation Suite and Metric Reporting
tasks.description: Implement standard evaluation metrics to assess model performance.
tasks.details: Integrate metrics such as Accuracy, F1-Score, and Precision/Recall. Create an 'Evaluator' class that generates a performance summary report after validation runs.
tasks.testStrategy: Use a known set of predictions and ground truths to verify that metric calculations match expected mathematical results.

tasks.title: Logging and Visualization Integration
tasks.description: Add support for real-time training telemetry and logging.
tasks.details: Integrate a logging provider (e.g., TensorBoard or Weights & Biases) to track loss curves and gradient distributions. Use a standard Python logging module for console output.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that log files are generated in the specified directory and contain the expected scalar values.

tasks.title: Deployment Wrapper and Documentation
tasks.description: Finalize the package for use and document the API for developers.
tasks.details: Create a basic FastAPI or Flask wrapper to expose the Inference Engine as a REST endpoint. Complete the README.md with usage examples for training and inference.
tasks.testStrategy: Perform an end-to-end test starting from data loading to a successful REST API prediction response.
